sections.lbl: Lifestyle · Home · Fashion · Travel & everything in between
sections.p: Provenance is a considered creator studio, devoted to original, unhurried content for brands that value the quiet details.

sections.h: We are a small studio of storytellers and stylists who believe beautiful things deserve a beautiful telling.
Meet Wren — founder, stylist, collector of quiet moments.
sections.body: Placeholder bio: after a decade styling homes and shoots for others, Wren opened Provenance to tell slower stories — the kind that hold up years later. She still irons the linens herself.

sections.h: We believe in crafting a curated life — not a crowded one. Fewer things, chosen well, photographed honestly.

sections.q: Working with Provenance felt like handing our brand to someone who loved it as much as we do. Every frame came back better than the brief.

cards.t: On arranging a room around the morning light
A quiet wardrobe: ten pieces, one season
The unhurried guide to a weekend away

sections.title: Get the Freebie
sections.body: Our placeholder style guide: the checklist we run before every shoot — light, layers, and the details worth the extra hour.
